PASOS.LABEL: Process

PASOS.P2_D: Our masters prepare your order fresh with the best ingredients.

RESEÑAS.R1_T: The best in Teatinos! The bread arrives actually crunchy, crazy good.
RESEÑAS.R2_T: Amazing speed. The couple pack is perfect to save our Friday nights.
RESEÑAS.R3_T: Pure Malaga quality. You can tell the products are fresh and local.

FAQ.Q1: Do you deliver to my area?
FAQ.A1: We deliver all over Teatinos, Colonia Santa Ines and near the University.
FAQ.A2: Yes! We have special bread and we strictly avoid cross-contamination.
FAQ.A3: Yes, you can choose your preferred delivery time at checkout.

CONTACTO_PAGE.LEAD: We are in Teatinos, Málaga. You can contact us for questions about orders, allergens, delivery areas, issues or restaurant information.
CONTACTO_PAGE.REPARTO_DESC: We deliver to Teatinos, Colonia Santa Inés and around the University of Málaga. If you have doubts about your address, call us before confirming your order.

PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S1_P: Illo, Un Campero is the controller of the personal data collected through this web application.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S2_L1: Name, email address and phone number when you register.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S3_L2: Send you order confirmations and account-related communications.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S3_L3: Send you push notifications about your order status.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S4_P: Processing is based on the execution of the purchase contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and user consent for notifications and commercial communications (Art. 6.1.a GDPR).
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S5_L1: Firebase (Google LLC): authentication, database and push notifications. Data transfer to the US under standard contractual clauses.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S5_L2: Stripe Inc.: payment processing. Stripe does not store card data on our servers.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S6_L1: Firebase session cookies: necessary to keep your session active.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S6_L2: localStorage: to save language preferences and cookie acceptance.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S6_P2: We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_P: You can exercise the following rights:
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_L1: Access: request a copy of your personal data.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_L2: Rectification: correct inaccurate data from your profile.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_L3: Erasure: delete your account and all your data from the profile section.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_L4: Portability: request your data in a structured format.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_L5: Objection: object to processing at any time.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S7_P2: To exercise these rights, contact us via the email provided in the application.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S8_P: Data is retained as long as your account is active. When you delete your account, all personal data is permanently erased.
PRIVACIDAD_PAGE.S9_P: This service is not intended for children under 14 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.

LEGAL_PAGE.S1_P: This website belongs to Illo Un Campero, a Malaga-style campero sandwich restaurant located at Calle Camperos, 21, 29010 Málaga.
LEGAL_PAGE.S2_L3: Area of activity: Teatinos, Málaga and surroundings.
LEGAL_PAGE.S3_P: The website allows you to browse the menu, create an account, place online orders and check order status. Users agree to provide truthful information and to use the service in accordance with the law.
LEGAL_PAGE.S4_P: Texts, images, logos and graphic elements on this website belong to Illo Un Campero or are used with permission. Reproduction without consent is not allowed.
LEGAL_PAGE.S5_P: We work to keep information up to date, but prices, product availability and opening hours may change. The valid information for each order will be that shown during the checkout process.
LEGAL_PAGE.S6_P: You can learn how we process personal data in our
